actionItems.summary: The skill tied with baseline on all metrics (4/4 scores, 0.0 delta), meaning it adds no measurable value yet but doesn't hurt. The greeting format is solid but the eval didn't differentiate it from default behavior.
weaknesses: Zero delta across all metrics — the skill produced identical scores to baseline on the only eval case
Single eval case (greeting only) is insufficient to measure farewell behavior or variety over multiple sessions
The baseline already greets adequately at 4/4 content/structure, suggesting the skill's rules don't push beyond what the model does naturally
strengths: 100% assertion pass rate — all 4 assertions passed, meaning the skill meets minimum requirements
Clean, well-structured SKILL.md with concrete examples and anti-patterns (no emoji, no 'how can I help')
The skill doesn't degrade output — it's safe to keep iterating on
actionItems.suggestedFocus: Add a distinctive signature element (e.g., a rotating project-aware opener referencing recent git activity or last session context) that baseline behavior cannot replicate, giving the skill a measurable edge.
